name: Sunvine Maiden
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖蔓の乙女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サンヴァイン・メイデン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a Plant monster(s) you control that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, negate that effect. You can only use this effect of "Sunvine Maiden" once per turn. Your opponent cannot target "Sunavalon" or "Sunvine" Spells/Traps you control with card effects.
mnst_eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a Plant monster(s) you control that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, negate that effect. You can only use this effect of "Sunvine Maiden" once per turn. Your opponent cannot target "Sunavalon" or "Sunvine" Spells/Traps you control with card effects.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect that targets a Plant monster(s) you control that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, negate that effect. You can only use this effect of "Sunvine Maiden" once per turn. Your opponent cannot target "Sunavalon" or "Sunvine" Spells/Traps you control with card effects.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
